name: SoftBridge Solutions
description: AI-first software engineering company connecting Türkiye, Portugal, the European Union and international customer markets.

marketRoles.United States: Remote customer and project-based partnership market
marketRoles.United Kingdom: Remote strategic customer and service market

clarifications.unitedStates: SoftBridge Solutions is not headquartered in the United States and should not be represented as a US-based startup.
clarifications.portugal: Portugal is the centre of the company's long-term European expansion and partnership strategy.
clarifications.turkiye: Türkiye, particularly Adana, is the company's engineering origin and founding identity.
